name: collection_page_5_collections_all

observed_strengths.observation: Filter and Sort controls present ('Filter:', 'Sort by:') — product discoverability supported on large catalog (132 products)
132 products in catalog — broad range confirms full product depth (coffee varieties + accessories + apparel + drinkware)

missing_or_weak.observation: Collection page meta description is empty — no SEO description for the all-products page, missing organic ranking opportunity for category-level queries
'LIKE FREE SH*T?' is H1 on collection page — giveaway section overrides the natural product category H1, which weakens keyword relevance signal for collection-level organic traffic

purchase_path_notes: All-products collection is a large catalog with filter/sort. The main SEO gap is the empty meta description and promotional H1 overriding the collection heading.
